I-49.notes: Two separate segments (Texarkana north to Hwy 71, and Alma/Fort Smith north to the Missouri line, exits ~20-99). No major chain truck stops directly on I-49 in Arkansas; nearest full-service stops are on I-40 at Alma (exit 13) and in Texarkana on I-30.

I-555.notes: Turrell to Jonesboro; no major chain truck stops directly on the route. Nearest full-service stops are on I-55 at Blytheville and the West Memphis cluster on I-40/I-55.
